form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr2) over 2100m at Ruakaka, beaten 18 m by Muchacho (2:46.70) in 4yo+ on April 6 at $11.70. At the run before 10th (Sr1) over 2200m at this track, beaten 16 m by Skys Legacy (2:42.00) in 3yo+ on March 19 at $5. Can make an impact from this draw.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung inwards throughout. Over raced middle stages.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into seventh behind Ripples at this track over 1700m in a 3yo F on April 10 at $52.70. Performed better the start before with a solid effort when 3rd (Fr6) over 2200m at this track beaten 4 m by Lulana (2:37.70) in 3yo+ on April 2 at $5.80. Winning prospects from a good draw.

form.formComment: Last start 11th (Sr1) over 2200m at Alexandra Park, well beaten by River (2:40.60) in 3yo F on March 20 at $10.90. Two runs back 13th (Sr6) over 1980m at Addington, well beaten by All Of Me (2:21.80) in 2yo F on November 14 at $37.30. Much better placed and is up to winning this.
